description: Employer, city, and a pet mentioned implicitly across two turns.

messages.content: Hey — quick intro: I'm a senior PM at Notion, based in Berlin.
Nice to meet you. What brings you here today?
Sorry for the delay — I was just out walking Biscuit through Tiergarten. He's getting old, takes ages.
